name: the-mastery-of-love
description: Don Miguel Ruiz's 'The Mastery of Love: A Practical Guide to the Art of Relationship' — a Toltec wisdom guide to understanding love, healing emotional wounds, and building healthy relationships with yourself and others.
useCase: Understand real love vs conditional love, heal emotional wounds, build self-love, and improve relationships through Toltec wisdom.
knownRisks: Simplified framework — some readers may find it too basic for complex relationship issues
Spiritual/Toltec perspective — may not resonate with all readers
Emotional work can be triggering for those with unprocessed trauma
